quoted_text:
We are now in the next phase of the war, as predicted, the price war!

We clearly have Saudi (& OPEC) vs UAE jostling for the most competitive price to Asia. Iraq seems to be losing this atm. 

We now have more grades landing in Europe competitively too! 

This points to TI / USGC grades to stock builds & less exporting. 

Somethings got to give in Dated vs Dubai pricing to change to close the arb. 

#oil #oott
